title: HatsRotationEvent
description: Schema for rotation events emitted by hats flip. Consumed by praetor-comms-engineer and mesh dashboard.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of event emission

agent_name.description: Mesh agent name that was rotated

agent_id_before.description: Relay-mesh agent_id before rotation (null if unknown to hats CLI)

agent_id_after.description: Relay-mesh agent_id after rotation (null if unknown to hats CLI)

trigger.description: Trigger class that initiated the rotation

decision_rule.description: ID or description of the decision rule that selected this action

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the rotation in milliseconds

rollback_plan_id.description: Reference to the rollback plan YAML file

reason.description: Human-readable reason provided by operator or trigger
